overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character walking along a dirt path through grassy prairie at dusk. A rider on horseback passes by early in the clip, and the character continues walking past rock formations and scattered trees as the purple sunset fades to twilight.

events.description: rider on horseback passes from left to right across the field of view

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland, approaching a distant rock formation

notable_agents.action: cowboy on horseback riding quickly from left to right across the path

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through tall grass
tall green prairie grass covering the landscape
sparse oak trees dotting the distant horizon
sparse oak trees dotting the distant horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt path through open prairie at dusk, with a vibrant purple and pink sunset sky overhead. A rider on horseback suddenly passes from left to right, crossing the path. The landscape is dotted with scattered trees in the distance as the character moves steadily forward.

events.description: ambient light noticeably fades as dusk deepens toward twilight

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path, passing a tall vertical rock monolith on the right side

entered.detail: tall vertical rock monolith or standing stone beside the path
distant covered wagons or tents visible in the field ahead

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and passes a tall standing stone monolith on the right side of the path. In the distance, a campsite with covered wagons becomes visible. The sky continues to darken from purple to deeper blue as twilight settles over the prairie.

agents.ego_description: walking through an area with large rock outcroppings as night approaches, heading toward the distant campsite

entered.detail: large boulders and rock formations lining the right side of the path
cluster of trees becoming denser near the rock formations

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking as the landscape becomes rockier, with large boulders appearing on the right side of the path. The campsite grows closer in the distance while the sky darkens to deep twilight. The vegetation becomes slightly denser with more trees clustering near the rock formations.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a prairie path as a vibrant sunset fades into the deep blue of twilight. It begins with the character walking under a purple and pink sky while a rider on horseback crosses the path from left to right. As the character moves forward, the open landscape shifts to include a tall stone monolith on the right, while a distant campsite with covered wagons first emerges on the horizon. The scene then transitions into a rockier terrain where large boulders and denser clusters of trees line the path. Finally, the camera continues toward the approaching campsite as the overhead light settles into a dark, twilight hue.
